stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
At 10:07 you make a note of your position over the intersection of highways A3 and A92 (N48°49.0', E012°56.3'). Consider the DR positions DR-5 to DR-8 shown on the annex. Given the following information, determine your DR position at 10:19.

TAS: 120 kt
Wind: 075°/40 kt
True Heading: 085°
